questions.question: Define Artificial Intelligence. Explain the four approaches to AI with examples.
keyPoints: Definition of AI as systems performing tasks requiring human intelligence
Thinking Rationally - Laws of thought using logic
Acting Rationally - Rational agent approach (most common)

questions.question: Explain the Turing Test and its significance in AI. What are its limitations?
keyPoints: Description of the Turing Test (imitation game)
Requirements: NLP, knowledge representation, reasoning, learning
Total Turing Test includes vision and robotics

questions.question: Differentiate between Narrow AI and General AI with examples.
keyPoints: Current state: only narrow AI exists

questions.question: What are the core components of an AI system? Explain each briefly.
Explain the rational agent approach to AI. Why is it considered the dominant paradigm?
keyPoints: Acts through actuators to maximize performance
